editorial_article.classes: font-serif text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200 leading-relaxed text-lg sm:text-xl

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.bento_item: bg-surface border border-border rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border/40

status_badges.approved: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-400 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
status_badges.in_review: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-400 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
status_badges.rejected: bg-red-100 text-red-800 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
status_badges.pending: bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider

admin_tables.header: bg-surface-muted px-6 py-4 border-b border-border text-sm font-medium text-text-secondary uppercase tracking-wider

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract graphical user interface, clean light mode
Dynamic abstract art with floating shapes

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for staggered page entrances and hover reveals.
Install '@phosphor-icons/react' for all iconography to match the sleek SaaS look.
Ensure 'next-themes' or equivalent is used for the dark/light mode toggle.
All forms (Login, Register, Contact) must use Shadcn customized inputs with generous padding (e.g., p-4, h-12).
CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to every button, link, form input, and interactive tab.
Implement the landing page with a hero section displaying the abstract SaaS background, a 'bento' grid for features, a marquee of partner_logos, and testimonials using the portrait images.
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for all headings and 'Satoshi' for UI body text. Use 'Instrument Serif' specifically for the content of the published articles to give an editorial, reading-focused feel.
Avoid any generic purple/violet gradients. Use pure B&W with high-contrast UI and accent colors strictly for interactive states or badges.
The Dashboard and Admin panel should be 'cardless' or use very subtle borders (1px border-border) instead of heavy shadows to maintain a clean Notion-like appearance.
Article editor modal should integrate React Quill (or similar) cleanly with minimal UI chrome.
Add tailwind configuration for font families 'cabinet', 'satoshi', and 'serif'.
